options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <pin_name> # Name of the pin

options.name: -exclude_opposite_polarity
options.description: Allows only comparison of the same clock of the same polarity

options.name: -exclude_related_input_pins
options.description: Allows only comparison of the clock going through the same input pins of specified gate

options.name: -exclude_same_polarity
options.description: Allows only comparison of the clock going through the same launch/capture path

options.name: -group
options.description: Defines a set of clocks that are exclusive to the clocks defined in all other groups

options.name: -inputs
options.description: List or collection of input pins for which clock exclusivity is recognized
